hooks.command: cmd=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))'); case "$cmd" in *"git push"*) : ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ -f "$root/package.json" ] || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; npm run format:check && npm run lint && exit 0; echo 'pre-push checks failed — fix format/lint locally, then retry push' >&2; exit 2
